notes: Official hosted MCP docs show remote URL-based configuration.
Some clients trigger browser-based auth during setup.
Manual header-based auth exists for CI or non-DCR clients.
Some MCP clients automatically open a browser for Supabase login during setup.
Hosted Supabase MCP uses dynamic client registration, so a PAT is no longer required for normal interactive setup.
Manual Authorization header setup is documented for CI and non-DCR clients.
This is raw collected data, not runtime source of truth.
Collected from Firecrawl scrape output and trimmed to the useful MCP fields.
